rationale: Hypothesizes that three consecutive large overnight gaps down in QQQ indicate structural capitulation, providing a high-probability TECL entry.
expected_failure_mode: In severe structural bear markets, consecutive down gaps may merely signal the beginning of a larger volatility expansion.
stop_conditions: quick grid has no candidate worth full certification
targeted window still fails after timing repair
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
Average trade duration exceeds 10 days without achieving profitability.
Maximum drawdown during the trade window exceeds 15%.
